name: stockyard-routefall
description: Automatic failover routing between LLM providers. When OpenAI is down, traffic auto-routes to Anthropic or Groq. Circuit breaker pattern included.

tools.name: routefall_provider_status
tools.description: Get health status of all configured LLM providers.

tools.name: routefall_routing_stats
tools.description: Get routing statistics: requests per provider, failover counts, circuit breaker trips.

tools.name: routefall_set_primary
tools.description: Change the primary provider for routing.

tools.name: routefall_proxy_status
tools.description: Check if the FallbackRouter proxy is running and healthy.
